name: chargedesk
description: Reads ChargeDesk charges, customers, subscriptions, and products through the ChargeDesk REST API.

risk.read: external ChargeDesk API read of billing/charge, customer, subscription, product, activity-log, and cancellation-log data
risk.write: external mutations creating/updating/deleting customers, charges, webhooks, and agents, plus live gateway methods (refund/capture/void a charge, cancel a subscription) that mutate the connected payment gateway; every write action requires approval
risk.approval: read: none; write: required for every action
